title: Create Buttons & Levers
description: Better buttons and levers with the style of Create and ON/OFF indicators
body:
This Resource Pack modifies all buttons and levers models and textures to show when they are ON or OFF and match with Create's style.

# Compatibility
- Vanilla Minecraft:
  - Lever and oak, spruce, birch, jungle, acacia, dark oak, mangrove, cherry, pale oak, bamboo, crimson, warped, stone, blackstone, copper, exposed copper, weathered copper and oxidized copper buttons.
  - Also with [Copper Age Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-copper-age).
- Create:
  - Tweaked analog lever indicator model to fix some gaps and better ambient occlusion shadows.
